overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a coastal forest trail. The journey progresses from dense woodland to open coastal views with a passing sailboat, then through shaded birch forests with wooden barriers, finally approaching a distant stone tower ruin.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords on his back

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming dense woodland on both sides of the path
narrow dirt path winding through the forest with grass edges
blue ocean water visible through gaps in the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through dense forest. Tall trees line both sides with dappled sunlight filtering through, while the blue ocean becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal path with ocean views

events.description: sailboat with white sail passes by on the water to the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the coastal trail with the ocean visible to his right

entered.detail: wooden sailboat with white sail moving along the coastline
sandy beach area between the trail and the waterline

segments.scene_description: The path opens to reveal a wide coastal view with the ocean on the right. A sailboat with white sails passes by on the water near the sandy shore while Geralt continues walking along the exposed trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed birch forest with wooden barriers

events.description: path enters denser forest section with wooden log barriers lining the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the shaded forest section with darker lighting

entered.detail: white-barked birch trees with green foliage creating a shaded canopy
cut wooden logs lining the right edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail re-enters dense forest with birch trees and darker, diffused lighting. Wooden log barriers appear along the right side of the path as the coastal views disappear behind the thick vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching stone tower ruin

events.description: stone tower ruin becomes visible through the trees ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the distant stone tower structure visible ahead

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone tower ruin with conical roof visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: As the forest opens slightly, a tall stone tower ruin becomes visible ahead on the path. The wooden barriers end and the trail continues toward this prominent landmark with the ocean still visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal trail that shifts from dense woodland to open seaside vistas before returning to a shaded forest. It begins with Geralt walking a narrow dirt path through tall trees with dappled sunlight, moving forward until the blue ocean first appears in the distance. As the path opens, the scene expands into a wide coastal view where a white-sailed boat passes by the sandy shore. The trail then re-enters a thick birch forest with darker, diffused lighting and wooden log barriers, causing the ocean views to disappear behind the vegetation. Finally, the forest opens slightly as the wooden barriers end, revealing a tall stone tower ruin ahead with the ocean reappearing to the right.
